extracted.title: REMINDER- NBPL Glen Ullin Station 6 Outage; Manning Station 5 Outage
extracted.description:
NBPL reminds customers of the upcoming Bison XP Project maintenance at the Glen Ullin Compressor Station (CS 6), and Manning Compressor Station (CS 5), impacting the Flow Past Glen Ullin internal constraint (GlenSEG).

As a result, Flow Past Glen Ullin capacity will be reduced to 2,160-MMcf/d for Wednesday, March 18, through Thursday, March 26, and will be reduced to 2,165 MMcf/d for March 28, through March 31. as described in the maintenance notice posted February 9, 2026. (Notice ID: 25978026).

Based on current nominations, it is anticipated that this posting will result in the capacity allocation reduction of IT, Firm Secondary and potentially a portion of Firm Primary volumes. Since NBPL anticipates that this restriction may impact its ability to deliver all nominated Firm Primary services, NBPL will apply the Reservation Charge Crediting Mechanism of Northern Border’s FERC Gas Tariff Section 6.6.7 as necessary.

Please contact your Northern Border Customer Service Representative with any questions regarding nominations or scheduling at (866) 581-6487.
affectedLocations: Flow Past Glen Ullin internal constraint (GlenSEG)
